overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a character walking through a narrow rocky canyon path in an urban environment. A white delivery truck briefly crosses the path from left to right, and modern office buildings are visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path cutting through urban area

events.description: white delivery truck enters from left and drives across the gravel path
truck passes directly in front of camera, temporarily blocking the view of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the narrow gravel canyon toward the distant city buildings

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving from left to right across the canyon path

entered.detail: tall dark rocky cliff face forming the left side of the narrow canyon
rocky formation with dense green vegetation covering the right side
green trees and bushes growing on the right rock formation
modern multi-story office buildings visible through the canyon opening ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with dark walls on both sides and vegetation on the right. The path is covered in gravel, and modern office buildings are visible in the distance. A white delivery truck suddenly enters from the left and drives across the path, temporarily blocking the camera's view before exiting to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon approach to urban office complex

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the canyon opens up toward the large beige office building ahead

entered.detail: large beige concrete office building with grid-patterned windows dominating the view ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the canyon as the path approaches a large beige office building. The distant city skyline is replaced by the prominent concrete building ahead, while the rocky walls and vegetation on the right side draw closer as the canyon narrows toward the urban structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow rocky canyon that gradually merges into a modern urban environment. It begins with the character walking along a gravel path flanked by dark stone walls and sparse vegetation, with distant office buildings framing the horizon. As the camera advances, a white delivery truck suddenly crosses from left to right, momentarily obscuring the view before clearing the path. The scene then shifts as the distant skyline is replaced by a prominent beige office building that looms ahead. Finally, the rocky walls and greenery draw closer, narrowing the passage as the camera pushes directly toward the concrete urban structure.
